title: Dell security advisory (AV26-716)
description: Between July 13 and 19, 2026, Dell published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products:
products: Dell PowerEdge Server  multiple versions and models
Dell PowerProtect Data Manager  versions prior to 20.2.0.0
Dell SmartFabric Manager  versions prior to 2.2.1
Dell Storage Monitoring and Reporting  versions prior to 6.1.1.0
Dell Storage Resource Manager  versions prior to 6.1.1.0
Dell ThinOS 10  multiple versions and models
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
